sentence: 她听到孩子哭声，急忙跑了过去。
pinyin: Tā tīng dào háizi kū shēng, jímáng pǎole guòqù.
english: Hearing the child cry, she hurried over.

sentence: 她穿了件很醒目的红色外套。
pinyin: Tā chuān le jiàn hěn xǐngmù de hóngsè wàitào.
english: She wore a very eye-catching red jacket.

sentence: 他今天系了一条深蓝色的领带。
pinyin: Tā jīntiān jì le yī tiáo shēnlánsè de lǐngdài.
english: He wore a dark blue necktie today.

sentence: 大家都希望国家越来越富强。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu xīwàng guójiā yuè lái yuè fùqiáng.
english: Everyone hopes the country becomes more and more prosperous and strong.

sentence: 普通话有四个声调，初学者容易搞混。
pinyin: Pǔtōnghuà yǒu sì gè shēngdiào, chūxuézhě róngyì gǎohùn.
english: Mandarin has four tones, which beginners often confuse.
